title: Miro API tokens should not be disclosed
description: Miro is a collaborative whiteboard platform. API tokens and client secrets authenticate requests to access boards, team data, and user information. Exposing tokens allows unauthorized access to boards and workspace data.
recommendation: Remove Miro API tokens from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate at miro.com/app/settings/user-profile/apps.
impact: Unauthorized access to boards and workspace data, team member information exposure, and board content modification.

checks.message: Miro API access token detected. Miro access tokens authenticate requests to read and write board content and structure, access team and organization member data, manage board permissions and sharing settings, create and delete boards, and access user profile information. Exposing this token allows unauthorized access to all boards the token owner can access. Rotate immediately at miro.com/app/settings/user-profile/apps.
Miro OAuth client secret detected. Rotate at miro.com/app/settings/user-profile/apps.
